precondition: Local ASR is not ready and Electron exposes Web Speech Recognition but the recognition service is unavailable
expected_behavior: UI shows 语音识别服务不可用 and keeps system dictation as a temporary fallback.

precondition: No local ASR binary or model path is configured
expected_behavior: Settings shows 本地语音识别未配置 with a readable setup hint.

precondition: A local ASR model exists but the configured binary is missing
expected_behavior: UI shows 缺少本地识别程序 without showing the full configured path.

precondition: A configured local ASR binary exists but is not executable
expected_behavior: UI shows 识别程序不可执行 without running the binary or showing the full configured path.

precondition: A local ASR binary exists but the model file is missing
expected_behavior: UI shows 缺少本地语音模型 without showing the full configured path.

precondition: A safe local ASR binary and model are configured
expected_behavior: Settings shows 本地语音识别可用 and does not start recording until the user clicks the voice button.

precondition: Local ASR config status is not ready
expected_behavior: Check Local ASR is disabled or returns 配置未就绪 without starting the binary.

precondition: Configured local ASR binary is missing
expected_behavior: Check Local ASR stays disabled and the UI shows 缺少本地识别程序.

precondition: Configured local ASR model is missing
expected_behavior: Check Local ASR stays disabled and the UI shows 缺少本地语音模型.

precondition: Local ASR config is ready and the fake binary returns help-like output
expected_behavior: Settings shows 可以启动 and explains that this does not prove transcription is available.

precondition: Local ASR config is ready but the fake binary does not exit before the probe timeout
expected_behavior: Settings shows 启动超时 with a safe Chinese summary.

precondition: Local ASR config is ready but the fake binary exits with a non-zero code and no help-like output
expected_behavior: Settings shows 启动失败 without exposing raw stdout or stderr.

precondition: Local ASR CLI probe has been run
expected_behavior: Probe does not fill the chat input, send a message, create audio files, write memory, alter prompt preview, run retrieval, or extract game context.

precondition: User clicks Test Recording and denies microphone permission
expected_behavior: UI shows 麦克风权限被拒绝 and does not crash.

precondition: User clicks Test Recording and grants microphone permission
expected_behavior: Renderer starts MediaRecorder only after the user click and shows 正在录音.

precondition: User stops Test Recording manually
expected_behavior: Recorder stops, all audio tracks are stopped, and the blob is sent only to the local backend probe endpoint.

precondition: User does not stop Test Recording manually
expected_behavior: Recording stops automatically at the maximum duration and does not become continuous listening.

precondition: A small browser-recorded audio blob is posted to the backend audio probe endpoint
expected_behavior: Backend writes the blob to a temp file, checks size and MIME summary, deletes the temp file, and returns a safe summary.

precondition: Audio probe upload exceeds the maximum size
expected_behavior: Backend returns 录音文件过大 and does not keep the uploaded audio.

precondition: Audio probe receives empty data or an unsupported MIME type
expected_behavior: Backend returns 录音数据无效 without exposing the payload.

precondition: Audio probe writes a temp file
expected_behavior: Temporary audio is deleted immediately and UI shows 临时音频已清理.

precondition: Backend cannot delete the temp audio file on the first cleanup attempt
expected_behavior: Backend returns 临时音频清理失败 with no temp path or raw exception.

precondition: Audio capture probe succeeds
expected_behavior: No ASR is called, no transcript is produced, and the chat input remains unchanged.

precondition: Audio capture probe succeeds while the chat input is empty
expected_behavior: No chat request is sent, memory is not written, retrieval is not triggered, and game context extraction is not triggered.

precondition: Audio capture lifecycle events are visible in Event Stream and Debug Panel
expected_behavior: UI shows duration, size, MIME, and cleanup status only; it does not show paths or audio data.

precondition: Local ASR is ready and a short push-to-talk recording is transcribed
expected_behavior: Transcript fills the input box and Event Stream only shows completion plus character count.

precondition: Local ASR subprocess fails or times out
expected_behavior: UI shows 本地语音识别失败 with a Chinese summary and no raw subprocess output.

precondition: Local ASR returns a transcript
expected_behavior: Transcript remains editable in the input and is not sent until the user clicks 发送.

precondition: Local ASR fills the input but the user has not clicked send
expected_behavior: Unconfirmed transcript does not enter memory, prompt preview, knowledge retrieval, or game context extraction.

precondition: Backend writes temporary audio for local ASR
expected_behavior: Temporary audio is deleted after completion, failure, or timeout; UI does not show the full temp path.

precondition: Local ASR lifecycle events are visible in Event Stream
expected_behavior: Event Stream shows Chinese lifecycle summaries and character counts only.

precondition: Packaged app has no local ASR binary or model configured
expected_behavior: Packaged app stays usable, shows local ASR unavailable fallback, and does not write models or user data into the app bundle.

precondition: Local ASR config status is not local_asr_ready
expected_behavior: Record & Transcribe stays disabled and backend refuses transcription without launching the binary.

precondition: Local ASR config is ready and a fake binary prints Margit 怎么打
expected_behavior: Backend runs the configured binary with model and temp audio args, cleans temp audio, and renderer fills the input.

precondition: Renderer submits Local ASR language zh-CN and backend builds the whisper-like command
expected_behavior: Backend passes -l zh to the local ASR command, defaults unsafe or unsupported language to zh, and never passes raw unsupported language into subprocess args.

precondition: Local ASR returns a Traditional Chinese transcript such as 瑪爾基特怎麼打
expected_behavior: Backend trims and collapses whitespace, lightly normalizes ASR transcript to Simplified Chinese before the renderer fills input, and Event Stream only shows character count plus 已规范为简体中文.

precondition: Local ASR config is ready and the fake binary returns empty or log-only output
expected_behavior: UI shows 没有识别到可用文本 and does not change the input.

precondition: Local ASR config is ready but the fake binary does not exit before transcription timeout
expected_behavior: Backend returns 本地语音识别超时，可以尝试更小模型或更短录音, cleans temp audio, and UI keeps the input unchanged.

precondition: Local ASR config is ready but the fake binary exits nonzero
expected_behavior: Backend returns a safe failed status without raw stdout or stderr, and renderer does not fill transcript.

precondition: Local ASR transcription finishes after writing temp audio
expected_behavior: Response and UI show temporary_file_cleaned true and no temp audio remains.

precondition: Backend cannot delete the transcription temp directory on the first cleanup attempt
expected_behavior: Backend returns 临时音频清理失败 with no transcript, raw exception, or temp path.

precondition: Local ASR transcription succeeds and fills the input
expected_behavior: No /api/chat call is made until the user clicks 发送.

precondition: Local ASR transcription succeeds but the user has not sent the text
expected_behavior: No memory write, prompt preview refresh, knowledge retrieval, or game context extraction is triggered before send.

precondition: Local ASR transcription lifecycle appears in Event Stream
expected_behavior: Event Stream displays start/completed/error summaries, char count, duration, size, MIME, and cleanup only.

precondition: Packaged app is opened with optional fake binary and fake model env configured
expected_behavior: Packaged app can record and fill input from fake local ASR while Event Stream remains sanitized.

precondition: Local ASR config is ready and a fake whisper-like binary prints plain text
expected_behavior: Backend parses the plain transcript, cleans temp audio, and renderer only fills the input.

precondition: Local ASR config is ready and a fake whisper-like binary prints timestamped transcript lines
expected_behavior: Backend strips timestamp prefixes and joins multi-line text into a readable transcript.

precondition: Local ASR config is ready and a fake whisper-like binary prints whisper/system logs plus transcript
expected_behavior: Backend drops obvious log noise and only keeps the transcript text.

precondition: Local ASR config is ready and a fake whisper-like binary returns empty output
expected_behavior: Backend returns no_text, renderer keeps the input unchanged, and no chat flow is triggered.

precondition: Local ASR config is ready and a fake whisper-like binary returns a long transcript payload
expected_behavior: Backend truncates transcript to the configured length limit before returning it.

precondition: Renderer captures audio with a MIME such as audio/webm
expected_behavior: Settings and Debug Panel show a safe MIME summary and a gentle note that WAV conversion may be needed later.

precondition: Local ASR config is ready, renderer captures audio/webm, and REILINK_AUDIO_CONVERTER_BINARY is unset or unusable
expected_behavior: Backend returns a safe conversion-not-configured summary, does not call local ASR, cleans temp audio, and renderer shows 尚未配置音频转换工具.

precondition: Local ASR config is ready, renderer captures audio/webm, and a fake ffmpeg-like converter writes a WAV file
expected_behavior: Backend calls the converter with list args, passes the converted WAV path to local ASR, reports converted_mime_type audio/wav, and only fills the input after transcript success.

precondition: Local ASR config is ready and the configured audio converter exits nonzero or writes no WAV output
expected_behavior: Backend returns 音频格式转换失败, skips local ASR transcription, cleans temp audio, and does not expose converter stdout/stderr.

precondition: Local ASR config is ready and the configured audio converter does not finish before the conversion timeout
expected_behavior: Backend returns 音频格式转换超时, skips local ASR transcription, cleans temp audio, and renderer keeps the input unchanged.

precondition: Local ASR transcription succeeds after audio conversion and appears in Event Stream
expected_behavior: Event Stream and Debug Panel show safe conversion status, source MIME, target MIME, cleanup flags, and safe converter name only.

precondition: User has prepared real local ASR binary and model outside the repo and launched ReiLink with REILINK_LOCAL_ASR_BINARY and REILINK_LOCAL_ASR_MODEL
expected_behavior: Settings and Debug Panel show Local ASR ready using safe filenames only; no model or binary is bundled or committed.

precondition: Real Local ASR config is ready and the user clicks Check Local ASR
expected_behavior: CLI probe reports that the binary can start while explaining this does not prove model compatibility or transcript quality.

precondition: Real Local ASR optional smoke is running and the user clicks Audio Capture Test with microphone permission granted
expected_behavior: Audio Capture Test records short local audio, shows duration / size / MIME, cleans temporary audio, and does not transcribe or fill the input.

precondition: Recorded MIME requires conversion and the user has configured REILINK_AUDIO_CONVERTER_BINARY to a local converter outside the repo
expected_behavior: Record & Transcribe reports safe conversion status, converted_mime_type audio/wav, and cleanup flags before ASR receives the converted WAV.

precondition: Real Local ASR config is ready, conversion is succeeded or not needed, and the user clicks Record & Transcribe
expected_behavior: A real transcript fills the chat input for user review, with no automatic chat send.

precondition: Real Local ASR transcription succeeds and a transcript is visible in the chat input
expected_behavior: The user must manually click send; no chat request is made immediately after transcription success.

precondition: Real Local ASR transcription succeeds but the user has not clicked send
expected_behavior: No memory write, prompt preview refresh, knowledge retrieval, semantic extraction, or game context update is triggered before send.

precondition: Packaged app is launched with user-configured real Local ASR env, model, and optional converter outside the app bundle
expected_behavior: Packaged app is not a black screen, backend health is ok, Local ASR controls render, Record & Transcribe can fill input, and app quit leaves no self-started backend residue.

precondition: Real Local ASR command completes but transcript parsing produces no safe text
expected_behavior: UI shows no-text troubleshooting guidance, keeps the input unchanged, and does not expose raw ASR output.

precondition: Real Local ASR command or conversion does not finish before its timeout
expected_behavior: UI shows timeout troubleshooting guidance, cleans temporary audio, skips auto-send, and does not expose raw subprocess output.

precondition: User has locally prepared a real whisper.cpp binary and model outside the repo
expected_behavior: Manual QA verifies config detection, CLI probe, Record & Transcribe, safe UI summaries, and no auto-send; failures may indicate format, model, binary, timeout, or parser incompatibility.

precondition: Packaged app is opened with optional real whisper.cpp binary and model env configured by the user
expected_behavior: Manual packaged QA verifies backend self-start, local ASR status, Record & Transcribe, sanitized Event Stream, and no backend residue after quit.

precondition: Local ASR transcription succeeds but the user has not clicked send
expected_behavior: The transcript only sits in the input and does not write memory, refresh prompt preview, trigger retrieval, or change game context.

precondition: Local ASR config status is local_asr_ready and browser Web Speech is unavailable
expected_behavior: The main chat voice button is enabled, shows 本地语音识别可用, and does not show 语音识别服务不可用.

precondition: Local ASR is ready and the user clicks the main chat voice button
expected_behavior: The main chat button records push-to-talk audio, posts it to the local ASR transcription endpoint, fills the transcript into the input, and waits for manual send.

precondition: Local ASR is not ready and Web Speech Recognition is available
expected_behavior: The main chat voice button keeps the Web Speech fallback, fills final transcript into the input, and does not call the Local ASR transcription endpoint.

precondition: Local ASR is not ready and Web Speech Recognition is unavailable or its service is unavailable
expected_behavior: The main chat voice button is disabled or safely unavailable and distinguishes the Local ASR status from the Web Speech service state.

precondition: Local ASR is ready, renderer records WebM/Ogg audio, and no audio converter is configured
expected_behavior: The main chat voice status shows 音频转换工具未配置, does not call the local ASR binary, keeps the input unchanged, and does not auto-send.

precondition: Main chat Local ASR transcription succeeds but the user has not clicked send
expected_behavior: The unconfirmed transcript stays only in the input and does not write memory, refresh prompt preview, trigger retrieval, or change game context.

precondition: No saved Local ASR user settings exist and env fallback is empty
expected_behavior: Settings -> Voice Input shows 本地 ASR 配置 / Local ASR Setup with binary, model, converter inputs and Save / Clear / Refresh controls.

precondition: User enters local ASR binary, model, and converter paths in Local ASR Setup and clicks Save
expected_behavior: Settings save calls the settings API, then the UI shows only safe basenames and a user_settings source; the full paths are not shown outside editing inputs.

precondition: Both saved user settings and Local ASR env fallback are present with different binary and model paths
expected_behavior: Status, probe, transcription, and conversion use saved user settings first and report source user_settings with safe basenames only.

precondition: Saved user settings exist and env fallback is configured
expected_behavior: Clear removes saved user settings and the next settings/status response falls back to env or none without exposing full env values.

precondition: Local ASR settings have been saved and status has been refreshed
expected_behavior: Event Stream, Debug Panel, and Raw JSON include only booleans, source, and safe binary/model/converter basenames.

precondition: Packaged app is opened without shell Local ASR env, user saves Local ASR paths in Settings, closes, and reopens the app
expected_behavior: Packaged app reloads Local ASR settings from the user data directory, remains non-black-screen, and keeps Debug/Event/Raw surfaces free of full paths.

precondition: Release build is created and packaged ReiLink.app is opened directly with no dev renderer
expected_behavior: The packaged app is not a black screen, the backend starts or connects, user data stays outside the .app, .env is not copied into the app, and app-owned backend processes are gone after quit.

precondition: Packaged app starts without Local ASR shell env and the user enters ASR binary, model, and converter paths in Settings
expected_behavior: Save persists user settings, Refresh Status becomes ready, and UI surfaces show only safe basenames for whisper-cli, ggml-base.bin, and ffmpeg.

precondition: Saved user settings point to an executable ASR binary, an existing model, and a usable converter
expected_behavior: Refresh Status rereads settings, reports source user_settings, enables Check Local ASR and Record & Transcribe, and keeps full paths out of Debug/Event/Raw JSON.

precondition: Local ASR settings were saved in packaged app and the app is closed and reopened
expected_behavior: The reopened packaged app reloads settings from the user data directory, shows source user_settings, remains ready, and Check Local ASR can still start.

precondition: Local ASR status is ready and the user clicks Check Local ASR
expected_behavior: The probe reports that the local ASR binary can start, without recording audio, passing model/audio paths, filling the input, or showing raw stdout/stderr.

precondition: Microphone permission is granted and the user clicks Audio Capture Test
expected_behavior: Audio Capture Test completes, shows duration, size, MIME, and cleanup status, and does not call ASR or fill the chat input.

precondition: Local ASR is ready, microphone permission is granted, and the user clicks Record & Transcribe
expected_behavior: Recording and local transcription succeed, cleaned transcript fills the input, and the send button still requires a user click before chat flow starts.

precondition: Local ASR is ready in the main chat screen
expected_behavior: The main chat voice button is available as Local ASR, does not show Web Speech unavailable as the primary path, and records/transcribes only after the user clicks.

precondition: Local ASR returns Traditional Chinese transcript content with English words and numbers
expected_behavior: The transcript is lightly normalized to Simplified Chinese while English and numbers remain intact, and only a character count plus normalization status appears in Debug/Event surfaces.

precondition: Local ASR transcription succeeds from Settings or the main chat voice button
expected_behavior: The transcript stays editable in the input and no chat request is made until the user manually clicks Send.

precondition: Local ASR transcript is present in the input but has not been manually sent
expected_behavior: Unconfirmed transcript does not write memory, update prompt preview, trigger knowledge retrieval, trigger semantic extraction, or change game context.

precondition: Settings -> Voice Input -> Local ASR Setup has existing text in one path input and the user opens the native picker
expected_behavior: Canceling the native file picker leaves the existing input unchanged and does not save, execute, copy, upload, or read any local file.

precondition: Settings -> Voice Input -> Local ASR Setup is visible and the user chooses ASR binary, model, and converter files
expected_behavior: Each native file picker button fills only its matching input field. Settings are persisted only after Save, Refresh Status can read the saved config, and Debug/Event surfaces show safe basenames rather than full paths.

precondition: Packaged app is opened during the Voice / Local ASR / Overlay Safe Mode freeze and Local ASR Setup is inspected
expected_behavior: Local ASR Setup shows three 选择... buttons, canceling a native picker keeps the current input, selecting binary/model/converter updates only the matching field, Save persists settings, Refresh Status and Check Local ASR still work, restart keeps settings, and Debug/Event surfaces never show full paths or transcripts.

precondition: Voice Output, Voice Input, and Local ASR are manually regressed before a merge-ready freeze
expected_behavior: Voice Output remains default off with Test Voice available, Web Speech is not treated as the reliable packaged path, Local ASR ready is visible, Record & Transcribe fills the input without auto-send, accepted memory is the only memory that enters prompt, and proactive content does not enter memory.

precondition: Local ASR settings, probe, audio capture, and transcription have all been exercised in a release smoke pass
expected_behavior: Event Stream, Debug Panel, Raw JSON, and chat surfaces show safe basenames and summaries only, never full configured paths, temp paths, raw subprocess output, full transcript, or audio payloads.

precondition: Saved Local ASR user settings exist and the user clicks Clear with no Local ASR env fallback configured
expected_behavior: Clear removes saved settings, Local ASR returns to unconfigured safe fallback, the main chat voice button falls back safely, and cleared full paths do not remain visible.

precondition: Packaged app started its own backend during Local ASR release smoke and the user quits the app
expected_behavior: After app quit, the app-owned backend is no longer listening and no Local ASR settings, temp audio, memory, session, or .env files were written inside the .app.
